\tzpentry{ID3811}{Cymatic Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3811 introduces Cymatic Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$Ĥcymatic = \int \rho(r, t) \Phi_{acoustic}[\omega, k, t] dr$
\]
